home.subtitle: Welcome! Here you'll find everything you need for your stay.

arrival.title: Arrival
arrival.subtitle: Check-in details, directions, and access instructions.
arrival.earlyReady: If the apartment is ready earlier, we’ll let you know.
arrival.entranceText: The entrance is on the inside of the building, not on the street side.
arrival.apartmentLocationText: The apartment is located on the 3rd floor, to the left of the elevator. If you take the elevator, it will be immediately on your right. The name "Doe" is on the door.
arrival.arrivalMessage: Please send us a quick message when you enter the apartment so we can register your arrival in eVisitor.
arrival.whatsappArrivalText: Hi! We have just arrived at the apartment.

parking.title: Parking
parking.subtitle: Where to park and what to keep in mind.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi
wifi.subtitle: Network details and the Wi-Fi password.

apartmentInfo.title: Apartment Info
apartmentInfo.subtitle: Find common household items and supplies.

ironingBoard.title: Ironing board
ironingBoard.text: Behind the kitchen door, next to the trash bin.

firstAidKit.title: First aid kit
firstAidKit.text: Inside the TV stand, on the right side, behind the glass door.

iron.title: Iron
iron.text: In the hallway cabinet next to the bathroom, on the left side.

extraTowels.title: Extra towels
extraTowels.text: In the hallway cabinet next to the bathroom, on the right side.

hairDryer.title: Hair dryer
hairDryer.text: In the bathroom, in the middle drawer under the sink.

washingMachineCapsules.title: Washing machine capsules
washingMachineCapsules.text: In the bathroom, in the first drawer under the sink.

tv.title: TV
tv.subtitle: Quick guide to using the TV.

turnOn.title: Turn on the TV
turnOn.text: Use the small remote to turn the TV on or off.

streaming.title: Streaming apps
streaming.text: Select the YouTube, Netflix, or HBO Max icon on the home screen.

channels.title: TV channels & EON
channels.text: Select the HDMI icon to open EON for TV channels and the EON library.

remote.text: Use the larger remote only inside the EON app.

coffeeMaker.title: Coffee Maker
coffeeMaker.subtitle: How to use the Dolce Gusto coffee machine.

steps.title: Turn on the machine
steps.text: Press the power button. The light will blink red while the machine heats up.

steps.title: Wait for the green light
steps.text: When the light turns green, the machine is ready to use.

steps.title: Remove the capsule holder
steps.text: Lift the top cover and pull out the capsule holder.

steps.title: Insert a capsule
steps.text: Place a coffee capsule inside the holder.

steps.title: Reinsert the capsule holder
steps.text: Push the capsule holder back into the machine and close the top cover.

steps.title: Select water level
steps.text: Move the selector up or down to match the number of bars shown on the capsule.

steps.title: Place your cup
steps.text: Put your cup under the coffee outlet.

steps.title: Make your coffee
steps.text: Move the lever to the red side for hot drinks. The machine will stop automatically.

steps.title: Wait for the green light again
steps.text: Wait until the power button turns green before removing the capsule holder.

steps.title: Remove the used capsule
steps.text: Lift the top cover, remove the capsule holder and throw away the used capsule. Do not leave used capsules inside the machine.

coffeeMaker.waitGreenAgain: Wait until the power button turns green again.
coffeeMaker.thenUseCapsule: Then use the coffee or chocolate capsule.
coffeeMaker.waterTankText1: If you refill or remove the water tank, make sure it is fully seated back in place.
coffeeMaker.waterTankText2: You can confirm it is positioned correctly when a few small air bubbles appear at the bottom of the tank after inserting it.
coffeeMaker.waterTankWarning: If the tank is not seated properly, the coffee machine may not dispense water.

dishwasher.title: Dishwasher
dishwasher.subtitle: Quick guide for everyday dishwasher use.
dishwasher.intro: Use one capsule, turn on the dishwasher, select a program, then press Start and close the door.

capsules.title: Dishwasher capsules
capsules.text: Place one capsule in the detergent compartment. Capsules are located under the sink.

selectProgram.title: Select program
selectProgram.text: Press the PROGR. button (2) to select the desired program.

start.title: Start the dishwasher
start.text: Press the START button (3), then close the dishwasher door.

dishwasher.programsIntro: Use one of the following programs depending on how dirty the dishes are.
dishwasher.manualText: For other programs, see the dishwasher manual in the kitchen cabinet or open the full manual below.

houseRules.title: House Rules
houseRules.subtitle: A few simple rules to help keep the apartment comfortable for everyone.
houseRules.respectTimes: Please respect these times so we have enough time to prepare the apartment for the next guests.
houseRules.quietHoursIntro: Please respect quiet hours in the building:
houseRules.noiseText1: The apartment is located in a residential building with many permanent residents. We kindly ask you to keep noise at a respectful level, especially in the hallway, stairwells, and elevator.
houseRules.noiseText2: If traveling with children, please make sure they do not run or play loudly in the hallway, stairwells, or elevator, as noise travels easily through the building.
houseRules.noSmokingText: Smoking is not allowed inside the apartment. You may smoke only on the terrace.
houseRules.lockDoorText: Please always keep the apartment door locked, even when you are inside.
houseRules.reportDamagesText: If anything gets damaged during your stay, please let us know as soon as possible.

checkout.title: Check-out
checkout.subtitle: A few quick things to do before you leave.
checkout.checkoutTimeReason: so we have enough time to prepare it for the next guests arriving that day.
checkout.turnOffAcText: Please switch off the air conditioning.
checkout.closeWindowsText: Please close all windows and terrace doors before leaving.
checkout.parkingCardText: If you used the parking card, please leave it in mailbox no. 14.
checkout.lockDoorText: Make sure the apartment is locked.
checkout.returnKeyText: Put the key back in the lockbox and scramble the digits.
checkout.leaveMessageTitle: Let us know when you leave
checkout.leaveMessageText: Please send us a message when you leave so we know the apartment is free for cleaning.
checkout.whatsappLeaveText: Hi! We have just left the apartment.

explore.title: Explore Zadar
explore.subtitle: Places, services and attractions in Zadar.

kolovare.name: Kolovare Beach
kolovare.text: The most popular city beach with crystal-clear water, shaded areas and cafés nearby.

borik.name: Borik Beach
borik.text: Family-friendly beach with shallow water, nearby restaurants and plenty of amenities.

uskok.name: Uskok Beach
uskok.text: A lively beach in the Puntamika area, popular for swimming, sunbathing and beach bars.

butler.name: Butler Gourmet & Cocktails
butler.text: Modern restaurant and cocktail bar with a stylish atmosphere and creative dishes.

harbor.name: Harbor CookHouse
harbor.text: Popular waterfront restaurant known for excellent burgers, steaks and cocktails.

bruschetta.name: Bruschetta
bruschetta.text: One of Zadar’s best-known restaurants, serving Mediterranean cuisine by the sea.

fosa.name: Foša
fosa.text: Fine dining restaurant located beside the historic city walls and harbour.

kantuna.name: 4 Kantuna
kantuna.text: Traditional Dalmatian restaurant offering local dishes in the heart of the Old Town.

garden.name: The Garden Lounge
garden.text: The perfect place for sunset cocktails with panoramic sea views.

supernova.name: Supernova Zadar
supernova.text: The largest shopping centre in Zadar with supermarkets, restaurants and many stores.

lidl.name: Lidl
lidl.text: Popular supermarket for groceries, drinks and everyday essentials.

kaufland.name: Kaufland
kaufland.text: Large supermarket offering groceries, household items and fresh produce.

cityGalleria.name: City Galleria
cityGalleria.text: Shopping centre with stores, cafés and a local market.

seaOrgan.name: Sea Organ
seaOrgan.text: A unique architectural installation that creates music using sea waves.

greetingSun.name: Greeting to the Sun
greetingSun.text: A solar-powered light installation best experienced at sunset.

donat.name: St. Donatus Church
donat.text: The symbol of Zadar and one of Croatia’s most important pre-Romanesque churches.

forum.name: Roman Forum
forum.text: The largest Roman forum on the eastern Adriatic coast.

peoplesSquare.name: People’s Square
peoplesSquare.text: The historic heart of Zadar surrounded by cafés and local life.

kalelarga.name: Kalelarga
kalelarga.text: Zadar’s most famous street and the centre of city life.

cathedral.name: St. Anastasia Cathedral
cathedral.text: The largest cathedral in Dalmatia with a bell tower offering city views.

landGate.name: Land Gate
landGate.text: The historic entrance to the Old Town and part of Zadar’s Venetian fortifications.

farmacia.name: Farmacia City Galleria
farmacia.text: For pain relief, vitamins, cosmetics, sunscreen and everyday health essentials. Prescription medication is not available.

jadranPharmacy.name: Jadran Pharmacy
jadranPharmacy.text: Open day and night, including weekends and public holidays. Prescription and non-prescription medication available.

emergency.name: Emergency Department
emergency.text: For urgent medical situations requiring immediate treatment at Zadar General Hospital.

touristClinic.name: Tourist Clinic
touristClinic.text: Medical care for tourists and visitors with non-emergency health concerns, including weekends and public holidays.

emergency.title: Emergency Contacts
emergency.subtitle: Important emergency phone numbers in Croatia.
emergency.infoText: In any emergency, call 112. Operators can connect you with police, ambulance or fire services.

police.title: Police
police.description: For police assistance and safety issues.

fire.title: Fire brigade
fire.description: For fire, smoke or rescue situations.

invalidLink.title: Guest guide unavailable
invalidLink.description: This guest guide link is invalid, expired, or no longer available.
invalidLink.help: Please check the link from your reservation or contact your host.

loader.title: Loading guide
loader.description: Please wait while we prepare your guest guide.
